content.thinking: Let me start by exploring the current state of the working directory to understand what we're working with, and then look at the MongoDB replica set configuration.

content.text: Let me first explore the working directory and understand the current MongoDB configuration.

apiVersion: v1
items:
- apiVersion: apps/v1
  kind: StatefulSet
  metadata:
    annotations:
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-replica","namespace":"mongodb"},"spec":{"replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"serviceName":"mongodb-replica-svc","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["mongod","--replSet=mongodb-replica","--keyFile=/keyfile/keyfile","--bind_ip_all","--auth"],"image":"mongo:7.0","name":"mongod","ports":[{"containerPort":27017}],"readinessProbe":{"exec":{"command":["mongosh","--eval","db.adminCommand('ping')","--quiet"]},"initialDelaySeconds":10,"periodSeconds":5,"timeoutSeconds":5},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/data/db","name":"data"},{"mountPath":"/keyfile","name":"keyfile"}]}],"initContainers":[{"command":["sh","-c","cp /keyfile-secret/keyfile /keyfile/keyfile\nchmod 400 /keyfile/keyfile\nchown 999:999 /keyfile/keyfile\n"],"image":"busybox:1.36","name":"copy-keyfile","volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/keyfile-secret","name":"keyfile-secret","readOnly":true},{"mountPath":"/keyfile","name":"keyfile"}]}],"terminationGracePeriodSeconds":30,"volumes":[{"name":"keyfile-secret","secret":{"secretName":"mongodb-keyfile"}},{"emptyDir":{},"name":"keyfile"}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"1Gi"}}}}]}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-07-04T00:52:36Z"
    generation: 2
    name: mongodb-replica
    namespace: mongodb
    resourceVersion: "2139167"
    uid: a7c13bdf-8f3c-4a9b-b2f2-a26fbff8229a
  spec:
    persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
      whenDeleted: Retain
      whenScaled: Retain
    podManagementPolicy: OrderedReady
    replicas: 3
    revisionHistoryLimit: 10
    selector:
      matchLabels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
    template:
      metadata:
        creationTimestamp: null
        labels:
          app: mongodb-replica
      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - mongod
          - --config
          - /etc/mongod/mongod.conf
          - --replSet=mongodb-replica
          - --keyFile=/keyfile/keyfile
          - --bind_ip_all
          - --auth
          image: mongo:7.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: mongod
          ports:
          - containerPort: 27017
            protocol: TCP
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
              - mongosh
              - --eval
              - db.adminCommand('ping')
              - --quiet
            failureThreshold: 3
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            successThreshold: 1
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          resources: {}
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
          volumeMounts:
          - mountPath: /etc/mongod
            name: mongod-config
            readOnly: true
          - mountPath: /data/db
            name: data
          - mountPath: /keyfile
            name: keyfile
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        initContainers:
        - command:
          - sh
          - -c
          - |
            cp /keyfile-secret/keyfile /keyfile/keyfile
            chmod 400 /keyfile/keyfile
            chown 999:999 /keyfile/keyfile
          image: busybox:1.36
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: copy-keyfile
          resources: {}
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
          volumeMounts:
          - mountPath: /keyfile-secret
            name: keyfile-secret
            readOnly: true
          - mountPath: /keyfile
            name: keyfile
        restartPolicy: Always
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext: {}
        terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
        volumes:
        - configMap:
            defaultMode: 420
            name: mongod-config
          name: mongod-config
        - name: keyfile-secret
          secret:
            defaultMode: 420
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
        - emptyDir: {}
          name: keyfile
    updateStrategy:
      rollingUpdate:
        partition: 0
      type: RollingUpdate
    volumeClaimTemplates:
    - apiVersion: v1
      kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
      metadata:
        creationTimestamp: null
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes:
        - ReadWriteOnce
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 1Gi
        volumeMode: Filesystem
      status:
        phase: Pending
  status:
    availableReplicas: 3
    collisionCount: 0
    currentReplicas: 3
    currentRevision: mongodb-replica-55f54686c7
    observedGeneration: 2
    readyReplicas: 3
    replicas: 3
    updateRevision: mongodb-replica-55f54686c7
    updatedReplicas: 3

      9ExkEJh3hvBcEQedJu3Q8MigkfZozLp1SXrqOLwAGTMDQvb07W449CFnrSXnUXBR

  metadata:

    creationTimestamp: "2026-07-04T00:51:53Z"

    namespace: mongodb

      storage:
        dbPath: /data/db
        wiredTiger:

      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"mongod.conf":"storage:\n  dbPath: /data/db\n  wiredTiger:\n    engineConfig:\n      journalCompressor: zlib\nnet:\n  bindIpAll: true\nreplication:\n  replSetName: mongodb-replica\nsecurity:\n  authorization: enabled\n  keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile\nsystemLog:\n  verbosity: 1\noperationProfiling:\n  mode: slowOp\n  slowOpThresholdMs: 200\n"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongod-config","namespace":"mongodb"}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-07-04T00:57:29Z"
    name: mongod-config
    namespace: mongodb
    resourceVersion: "2139230"
    uid: 1dd00c57-8c8f-485d-9053-4adfbadec564
- apiVersion: v1
  data:
    init-replica.sh: |
      #!/bin/bash
      set -e

      # Wait until mongod is accepting connections (unauthenticated, before auth is enforced)
      until mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval "db.adminCommand('ping')" --quiet 2>/dev/null; do
        echo "Waiting for mongod..."
        sleep 2
      done

      # Only the first pod initiates the replica set
      if [[ "$HOSTNAME" == "mongodb-replica-0" ]]; then
        echo "Initiating replica set..."
        mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval '
          rs.initiate({
            _id: "mongodb-replica",
            members: [
              { _id: 0, host: "mongodb-replica-0.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017" },
              { _id: 1, host: "mongodb-replica-1.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017" },
              { _id: 2, host: "mongodb-replica-2.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017" }
            ]
          })
        ' --quiet 2>/dev/null || true

        # Wait for PRIMARY
        echo "Waiting for PRIMARY..."
        until mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval "rs.status().myState" --quiet 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^1$"; do
          sleep 3
        done

        echo "Creating admin user..."
        mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval '
          db = db.getSiblingDB("admin");
          db.createUser({
            user: "admin-user",
            pwd: "admin123password",
            roles: [{ role: "root", db: "admin" }]
          });
        ' --quiet 2>/dev/null || true

        echo "Creating app user..."
        mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 -u admin-user -p admin123password --authenticationDatabase admin --eval '
          db = db.getSiblingDB("appdb");
          db.createUser({
            user: "app-user",
            pwd: "app123password",
            roles: [{ role: "readWrite", db: "appdb" }]
          });
        ' --quiet 2>/dev/null || true

        echo "Init complete."
      fi

      # Keep container running
      tail -f /dev/null
  kind: ConfigMap
  metadata:
    annotations:
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"init-replica.sh":"#!/bin/bash\nset -e\n\n# Wait until mongod is accepting connections (unauthenticated, before auth is enforced)\nuntil mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval \"db.adminCommand('ping')\" --quiet 2\u003e/dev/null; do\n  echo \"Waiting for mongod...\"\n  sleep 2\ndone\n\n# Only the first pod initiates the replica set\nif [[ \"$HOSTNAME\" == \"mongodb-replica-0\" ]]; then\n  echo \"Initiating replica set...\"\n  mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval '\n    rs.initiate({\n      _id: \"mongodb-replica\",\n      members: [\n        { _id: 0, host: \"mongodb-replica-0.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017\" },\n        { _id: 1, host: \"mongodb-replica-1.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017\" },\n        { _id: 2, host: \"mongodb-replica-2.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017\" }\n      ]\n    })\n  ' --quiet 2\u003e/dev/null || true\n\n  # Wait for PRIMARY\n  echo \"Waiting for PRIMARY...\"\n  until mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval \"rs.status().myState\" --quiet 2\u003e/dev/null | grep -q \"^1$\"; do\n    sleep 3\n  done\n\n  echo \"Creating admin user...\"\n  mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval '\n    db = db.getSiblingDB(\"admin\");\n    db.createUser({\n      user: \"admin-user\",\n      pwd: \"admin123password\",\n      roles: [{ role: \"root\", db: \"admin\" }]\n    });\n  ' --quiet 2\u003e/dev/null || true\n\n  echo \"Creating app user...\"\n  mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 -u admin-user -p admin123password --authenticationDatabase admin --eval '\n    db = db.getSiblingDB(\"appdb\");\n    db.createUser({\n      user: \"app-user\",\n      pwd: \"app123password\",\n      roles: [{ role: \"readWrite\", db: \"appdb\" }]\n    });\n  ' --quiet 2\u003e/dev/null || true\n\n  echo \"Init complete.\"\nfi\n\n# Keep container running\ntail -f /dev/null\n"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-init-scripts","namespace":"mongodb"}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-07-04T00:52:25Z"
    name: mongodb-init-scripts
    namespace: mongodb
    resourceVersion: "2138157"
    uid: 4519fee0-c7a2-45e4-9fca-1027ccafaba2
kind: List
metadata:
  resourceVersion: ""

    uid: 1dd00c57-8c8f-485d-9053-4adfbadec564
- apiVersion: v1
  data:
    init-replica.sh: |
      #!/bin/bash
      set -e

      # Wait until mongod is accepting connections (unauthenticated, before auth is enforced)
      until mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval "db.adminCommand('ping')" --quiet 2>/dev/null; do
        echo "Waiting for mongod..."
        sleep 2
      done

      # Only the first pod initiates the replica set
      if [[ "$HOSTNAME" == "mongodb-replica-0" ]]; then
        echo "Initiating replica set..."
        mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval '
          rs.initiate({
            _id: "mongodb-replica",
            members: [
              { _id: 0, host: "mongodb-replica-0.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017" },
              { _id: 1, host: "mongodb-replica-1.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017" },
              { _id: 2, host: "mongodb-replica-2.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017" }
            ]
          })
        ' --quiet 2>/dev/null || true

        # Wait for PRIMARY
        echo "Waiting for PRIMARY..."
        until mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval "rs.status().myState" --quiet 2>/dev/null | grep -q "^1$"; do
          sleep 3
        done

        echo "Creating admin user..."
        mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval '
          db = db.getSiblingDB("admin");
          db.createUser({
            user: "admin-user",
            pwd: "admin123password",
            roles: [{ role: "root", db: "admin" }]
          });
        ' --quiet 2>/dev/null || true

        echo "Creating app user..."
        mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 -u admin-user -p admin123password --authenticationDatabase admin --eval '
          db = db.getSiblingDB("appdb");
          db.createUser({
            user: "app-user",
            pwd: "app123password",
            roles: [{ role: "readWrite", db: "appdb" }]
          });
        ' --quiet 2>/dev/null || true

        echo "Init complete."
      fi

      # Keep container running
      tail -f /dev/null
  kind: ConfigMap
  metadata:
    annotations:
      kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
        {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"init-replica.sh":"#!/bin/bash\nset -e\n\n# Wait until mongod is accepting connections (unauthenticated, before auth is enforced)\nuntil mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval \"db.adminCommand('ping')\" --quiet 2\u003e/dev/null; do\n  echo \"Waiting for mongod...\"\n  sleep 2\ndone\n\n# Only the first pod initiates the replica set\nif [[ \"$HOSTNAME\" == \"mongodb-replica-0\" ]]; then\n  echo \"Initiating replica set...\"\n  mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval '\n    rs.initiate({\n      _id: \"mongodb-replica\",\n      members: [\n        { _id: 0, host: \"mongodb-replica-0.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017\" },\n        { _id: 1, host: \"mongodb-replica-1.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017\" },\n        { _id: 2, host: \"mongodb-replica-2.mongodb-replica-svc.mongodb.svc.cluster.local:27017\" }\n      ]\n    })\n  ' --quiet 2\u003e/dev/null || true\n\n  # Wait for PRIMARY\n  echo \"Waiting for PRIMARY...\"\n  until mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval \"rs.status().myState\" --quiet 2\u003e/dev/null | grep -q \"^1$\"; do\n    sleep 3\n  done\n\n  echo \"Creating admin user...\"\n  mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 --eval '\n    db = db.getSiblingDB(\"admin\");\n    db.createUser({\n      user: \"admin-user\",\n      pwd: \"admin123password\",\n      roles: [{ role: \"root\", db: \"admin\" }]\n    });\n  ' --quiet 2\u003e/dev/null || true\n\n  echo \"Creating app user...\"\n  mongosh --host localhost --port 27017 -u admin-user -p admin123password --authenticationDatabase admin --eval '\n    db = db.getSiblingDB(\"appdb\");\n    db.createUser({\n      user: \"app-user\",\n      pwd: \"app123password\",\n      roles: [{ role: \"readWrite\", db: \"appdb\" }]\n    });\n  ' --quiet 2\u003e/dev/null || true\n\n  echo \"Init complete.\"\nfi\n\n# Keep container running\ntail -f /dev/null\n"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-init-scripts","namespace":"mongodb"}}
    creationTimestamp: "2026-07-04T00:52:25Z"
    name: mongodb-init-scripts
    namespace: mongodb
    resourceVersion: "2138157"
    uid: 4519fee0-c7a2-45e4-9fca-1027ccafaba2
kind: List
metadata:

content.thinking:
Now I have a clear picture of the current MongoDB configuration:

From the `mongod-config` ConfigMap:
```yaml
storage:
  dbPath: /data/db
  wiredTiger:
    engineConfig:
      journalCompressor: zlib
net:
  bindIpAll: true
replication:
  replSetName: mongodb-replica
security:
  authorization: enabled
  keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
systemLog:
  verbosity: 1
operationProfiling:
  mode: slowOp
  slowOpThresholdMs: 200
```

I need to make three adjustments: increase the verbosity from 1 to 2, double the slow operation threshold from 200 to 400 milliseconds, and switch the journal compression from zlib to snappy. Let me apply these changes to the ConfigMap.

Once that's done, I'll trigger a rolling restart of the StatefulSet to roll out the updates. Since this is a replica set, the journal compression change is safe to apply during a rolling restart—the new setting takes effect on each pod restart while the others remain available.

content.text:
I can see the current configuration clearly:
- `verbosity: 1` → increase to 2
- `slowOpThresholdMs: 200` → double to 400
- `journalCompressor: zlib` → change to `snappy`

Updating the ConfigMap now.

input.command:
kubectl patch configmap mongod-config -n mongodb --type merge -p '{
  "data": {
    "mongod.conf": "storage:
  dbPath: /data/db
  wiredTiger:
    engineConfig:
      journalCompressor: snappy
net:
  bindIpAll: true
replication:
  replSetName: mongodb-replica
security:
  authorization: enabled
  keyFile: /etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile
systemLog:
  verbosity: 2
operationProfiling:
  mode: slowOp
  slowOpThresholdMs: 400
"
  }
}'
input.description: Patch mongod-config ConfigMap with updated settings

content.thinking:
Good. Now I need to do a rolling restart of the StatefulSet. I'll use `kubectl rollout restart` for this, but I need to be careful about the order for a replica set:

For a MongoDB replica set, the safe rolling restart order is:
1. Restart secondaries first
2. Restart the primary last

The StatefulSet's default rolling update goes from highest ordinal to lowest (2, 1, 0), which typically means the primary (usually pod 0) is restarted last. That's the safe order.
Since the StatefulSet uses OrderedReady policy, pods restart one at a time, so the cluster stays available throughout. I'll trigger the rolling restart with `kubectl rollout restart statefulset/mongodb-replica -n mongodb` and watch the progress.

content.text: Now trigger a rolling restart — StatefulSet will restart from pod 2 down to pod 0 (secondaries before primary) using the OrderedReady policy.

input.description: Trigger rolling restart of the StatefulSet
Wait for rolling rollout to complete

description: Wait for rolling rollout to complete
